title: New route? How are Iran-linked ships passing through Strait of Hormuz despite US blockade
summary_full: Amidst a US naval blockade, Iran-linked vessels navigated the Strait of Hormuz, signalling potential route shifts.  Traffic remains significantly reduced, with heightened checks by both US and Iranian forces slowing crossings. Conflicting claims emerge regarding successful breaches, as electronic interference and disabled tracking systems obscure full visibility in this critical global oil transit zone.
